title: Rewrite enum_reduce_awkward as a consistent idiomatic module
prompt: Refactor ALL four functions in test_fixtures/enum_reduce_awkward.ex. `group_by_parity/1` → use `Enum.split_with/2` (returns `{evens, odds}` tuple, then map into result). `first_match/2` → use `Enum.find/2`. `doubled/1` → use `Enum.map/2`. `max_value/1` → use `Enum.max/1` with an empty-list guard clause. Every function should use the most-idiomatic Enum function. Output a complete `defmodule MyApp.Accumulators do ... end`.
tier_rationale: Requires knowing four different Enum functions and picking the right one per function.
